reminders.bestBeforeLeadDaysDescription: How many days before a best-before date to trigger a reminder.
reminders.warrantyLeadDaysDescription: How many days before a warranty expiry to trigger a reminder.
reminders.lowStockRepeatDaysDescription: Comma-separated list of day offsets after the episode opens (each ≥ 1, e.g. 1,3,7).
reminders.scanTimeDescription: Time of day the reminder scan runs (household local time, 24-hour format).
reminders.maintenanceLeadDaysDescription: How many days before a maintenance date to trigger a reminder.

shoppingList.autoAddLowStockDescription: Automatically add items to the shopping list when stock falls below threshold.

email.recipientsNote: Email digests are sent to all active users who have an email address.
email.testHint: Sends a test email to your account using the currently saved settings.

http.webhookUrlDescription: Each new notification is POSTed to this URL.
http.integrationTokenDescription: Used to authenticate GET /api/integrations/state (for Home Assistant RESTful sensor).
http.integrationTokenGenerated: New token generated — copy it now, it will not be shown again.
http.stateEndpointLabel: State endpoint URL (for HA RESTful sensor)
http.stateEndpointDescription: GET this URL with ?token=<your-token> to retrieve live inventory counts.

mqtt.commandsEnabledDescription: When enabled, the bridge subscribes to {prefix}/command/# and executes stock operations (consume/intake/adjust).
mqtt.testHint: Publishes a retained test message to {prefix}/test to verify the broker connection.

scan.result: Scan complete — best-before: {{best_before}}, warranty: {{warranty}}, low-stock: {{low_stock}}, maintenance: {{maintenance}} new notifications.
